: Cal Day is UC Berkeley’s free annual public open house, and HKN will be holding drop-in introductory EECS workshops for campus visitors. In past years, our hands-on workshop projects have included creating a programmable LED array that could flash

reating a programmable LED array that could flash in different patterns using a MSP430 microcontroller, or a blinking LED controlled by a 555 timer IC chip. Event Details: April 21st, 2018 (Annual, Spring Semester) Eta Kappa Nu, Mu Chapter HOME | CON
